headline: Energy Bill Assistance Available for Qualified Duke Energy Florida Customers
summary: As Duke Energy Florida's storm cost recovery charges have been removed from customer bills as of February, dropping residential bills approximately $44 for every 1,000 kWh, additional bill assistance resources are available for eligible customers that may face continued payment challenges.

raw.headline: Energy Bill Assistance Available for Qualified Duke Energy Florida Customers
